items.title: The 1 Thing Investors in GE Aerospace and RTX Need to Know Before Buying Stock (And Why Airplanes Are Set to Look Dramatically Different in the Future)
items.description: GE Aerospace's joint venture, CFM International, is developing a revolutionary new engine that could change the face of flight.

items.title: Is Archer Aviation Stock a Buy Now?
items.author: Steven Porrello
items.description: Archer Aviation is developing electric vertical take-off and landing (eVTOL) aircraft for urban transportation, with a strong cash position and potential military contract opportunities, despite not yet receiving FAA certification.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Strong cash reserves ($1.73B), strategic partnerships with United Airlines and Boeing, potential defense contracts, and promising technology for urban air mobility
